title: ONTUBE Mortar and Pestle Set, Ceramic Stoneware Spice Herb Grinder Pill Crusher Set (3.2 Inch-Turquoise)
description:
About this item
【Humanized design】- ONTUBE ceramic mortar and pestle set suitable for daily use.
【Ceramic material】-This ceramic mortar and pestle set made of ceramic.The surface is smooth and translucent , which is easy to clean.It can be washed in the dishwasher.
【Multi-function use】- Ceramic mortar and pestle set can be used to preparing herbs, butter, pepper and garlic and so on.
MULTI SCENE APPLICATION: Elegant porcelain, simple design, suitable for families, hotels,restaurants and other occasions
MAKE DINING MORE ENJOY
reviews_5s: This is super solid. Very good material. It works great for crushing up my medication. Better than I imagined. Must buyI purchased this mortar and pestle because I pill cutter did not work for my situation. My dog would not eat the pieces of her monthly heart worm pill. This works very well for crushing the pill into powder. I thought of it because of my background in nursing. The price is reasonable, the color is cute. The size works very well for crushing one pill.Super cute and worked well for the project I had! It was tinier than expected but it did the job for my resin project. Plus I’m in pharmacy and it’s cute decoration while not used :)This was small and what I wanted. Nice size and nice weight.Use this when I was helping my dying dad and it helped so much.Poor wrist strength couldn't use the twist crushers this workers perfectly!The marble mortar & pestle we have is great for big jobs but I needed something much smaller for grinding a pinch of saffron threads, a tablespoon of thyme leaves, etc. This ONTUBE set is perfect for those jobs.Grinding herbs from my gardenI use this mortar set to grind saffron for my tea. It works great and I choose to hand wash it. It also looks really cute on the kitchen counter.Works great!
reviews_1s:
I found this pedestal was too small and difficult to use. It wasn't very well made. Used it once and sent it back.No se ve exactamente que tan grande es en realidadThe bottom of the pestle is concave and does not do a decent job of grinding.

Do not buy this product.DO NOT USE if you need to grind prescription medications! 1. Because this is textured, 10+% of the pill is forced into the texture of the ceramic and lost. Even careful scraping will not loosen all of it, nor a brush. 2. The glazing goes down 1/3 from the rim and forms a hard rim that blocks the pestal from reaching the sides, and it prevents easy pouring of your powders. 3. The ceramic grinds off and gets mixed into your pills. Perhaps it is harmless, but why ingest powdered ceramics?
I bought this to grind life-preserving medications and this mortar pestle set won't work. You lose too much medications ground into the mortar, and it doesn't come out without washing & scrubbing. This may be fine with vitamins or herbs, but this is not useful for proper medication dosage.
